title: Require Public Domain Surfaces In Recipes
forbids: recipe source importing domain code outside the public domain root, ops, or config surfaces
why: The G4 import matrix is positive recipe boundary authority: standard recipe source composes domains through named public surfaces, not relative reaches or deep domain internals.
message: Recipe source may import domain code only through @mapgen/domain/<domain>, @mapgen/domain/<domain>/ops, or @mapgen/domain/<domain>/config.js.
